default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Content Manager role at GrowthX with potential candidate Jessica Nicole Gayo.](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The Content Manager role involves producing content using GrowthX's proprietary automation tools, not managing other writers](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Work is primarily asynchronous, with flexible hours and a focus on deliverables rather than time logged](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [GrowthX is a rapidly growing startup (\~50 people, 45+ clients) with opportunities for advancement as the company scales](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [The company culture emphasizes transparency, open communication, and access to information across teams](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

## Topics

### Jessica's Background and Experience

  - [6 years of writing experience since graduating in 2019](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Worked with companies from various countries (US, Canada, Australia, Europe)](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Background in English literature, initially planned to be a teacher](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Experience in various types of writing: SEO, marketing, copywriting, news articles, magazines, newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Recent focus on marketing writing and SEO for startup companies](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Content Manager Role and Responsibilities

  - [Produce content using GrowthX's proprietary automation tools](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Typical workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
    1.  Receive strategy/keyword from Managing Editor
    2.  Use automation for research and initial drafts
    3.  Edit and refine content through multiple workflow steps
    4.  Final polish and submission to Managing Editor
  - [Handle 1-3 clients per week, producing 1-6 pieces of content weekly](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Participate in strategy discussions and team communication](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Potential for creating content for client publications in the future](https://fathom.video/share/y-AR17sCBPxV3juGygYJhNh9AocjFY1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
